---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["feature", "priority:medium"]
---

## Problem Statement

**What problem does this solve?**

[Describe the problem or limitation you've encountered. Why is this feature needed?]

---

## Proposed Solution

**What would you like to happen?**

[Describe the feature you'd like to see implemented. Be as detailed as possible.]

---

## Use Case

**Who would benefit and how?**

[Provide a real-world use case. This helps us prioritize features.]

Example:
- **User Type:** Enterprise compliance officer
- **Scenario:** Currently, I have to manually verify compliance status for each user across chains
- **Desired Outcome:** One-click compliance verification across all supported chains

---

## Alternative Solutions

**Have you considered other approaches?**

[Describe any alternative solutions or workarounds you've explored.]

---

## Examples / Reference

**Are there similar features in other projects?**

[Link to external examples, screenshots, or similar implementations]

---

## Component

- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Smart Contracts
- [ ] ZK Circuits
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

---

## Scope & Priority

**How urgent is this feature?**

- [ ] **Critical** — Blocks other work or essential functionality
- [ ] **High** — Important for roadmap or user experience
- [ ] **Medium** — Nice to have, enhances current functionality
- [ ] **Low** — Future consideration or enhancement

---

## Acceptance Criteria

**What would success look like?**

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

---

## Additional Context

[Any other information that might help, e.g., performance considerations, security implications, API changes]

---

## Checklist

- [ ] I've searched existing issues and found no duplicates
- [ ] I've provided a clear problem statement
- [ ] I've described the proposed solution
- [ ] I've included a real-world use case
